description: Covers the political economy, political culture, and the politics of identity (nationalism, race, ethnicity, social class, religion, and gender) that is usually associated with sport at both the highest and lowest levels of competition. Not open to students with credit for POLI SCI 616 prior to fall 2017

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Sophomore standing and (POLI SCI 120or182) or (POLI SCI 106 or 186 taken prior to fall 2017) or graduate standing
